query: UPDATE subscriptions SET name = ?, amount_cents = ?, currency = ?, interval = ?, anchor_date = ?, lead_days = ?, active = ?, notify = ?, cancel_mode = ?, cancel_period_value = ?, cancel_period_unit = ?, cancel_date = ?, category = ?, one_time = ?, pending_amount_cents = ?, pending_from = ? WHERE id = ?
